center.name: Edward Hargitt
center.summary: Edward Hargitt是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Arizona woodpecker，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Arizona woodpecker (Leuconotopicus arizonae) is a woodpecker native to southern Arizona and New Mexico and the Sierra Madre Occidental of western Mexico

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Arizona woodpecker (Leuconotopicus arizonae) is a woodpecker native to southern Arizona and New Mexico and the Sierra Madre Occidental of western Mexico
